channel.title: GlobalSentry Epidemiological Threat Feed
channel.description: Real-time simulated epidemiological disruptions and threats.

item.title: Global health networks brace for impact as unexpected surge in respiratory illnesses hits Atlanta.
item.description: This is a simulated epidemiological threat intelligence report for the GlobalSentry dashboard. The incident describes ongoing health risks and their projected impact on global health security and public safety.
